news.title:
EaseMyTrip partners with MSTC Ltd to provide tech-enabled travel solutions for the government.
Integration via APIs offers flights, hotels, buses, cabs, expanding into govt institutional travel.
news.summary:
EaseMyTrip partners with MSTC Ltd to provide tech-enabled travel solutions for the government.
Integration via APIs offers flights, hotels, buses, cabs, expanding into govt institutional travel.

news.title:
Easy Trip's Dec 2025 net sales fell 25.3% Y-o-Y to Rs 79.08 crore.
Net profit dropped 96.8% Y-o-Y to Rs 1.08 crore; EPS declined to Rs 0.00.
news.summary:
Easy Trip's Dec 2025 net sales fell 25.3% Y-o-Y to Rs 79.08 crore.
Net profit dropped 96.8% Y-o-Y to Rs 1.08 crore; EPS declined to Rs 0.00.

news.title:
Easy Trip's Dec 2025 net sales rose 0.7% YoY to Rs 151.66 crore.
Net profit dropped 82.6% YoY to Rs 5.85 crore; EPS fell to Rs 0.02.
news.summary:
Easy Trip's Dec 2025 net sales rose 0.7% YoY to Rs 151.66 crore.
Net profit dropped 82.6% YoY to Rs 5.85 crore; EPS fell to Rs 0.02.

news.title:
EaseMyTrip and ixigo brace for disruptions amid Iran-Israel conflict, advising flexible travel plans and monitoring airline updates.
Airspace closures may impact travel tech operators, causing reduced reservations, higher fuel costs, and revenue erosion if unrest persists.
news.summary:
EaseMyTrip and ixigo brace for disruptions amid Iran-Israel conflict, advising flexible travel plans and monitoring airline updates.
Airspace closures may impact travel tech operators, causing reduced reservations, higher fuel costs, and revenue erosion if unrest persists.

news.title:
Easy Trip Planners Ltd (ETPL) has incorporated a wholly owned subsidiary, EaseMyTrip Academy Private Limited, for educational training.
The new entity, with Rs. 1 crore capital, aims to create a new revenue stream through upskilling and vocational training.
news.summary:
Easy Trip Planners Ltd (ETPL) has incorporated a wholly owned subsidiary, EaseMyTrip Academy Private Limited, for educational training.
The new entity, with Rs. 1 crore capital, aims to create a new revenue stream through upskilling and vocational training.

news.title:
Easy Trip Planners plans to raise up to ₹500 Cr for growth and tech investments.
Board approved equity and securities issuance, subject to necessary approvals.
news.summary:
Easy Trip Planners plans to raise up to ₹500 Cr for growth and tech investments.
Board approved equity and securities issuance, subject to necessary approvals.

news.title:
Nifty fights to maintain 25,000 after shedding 200 points, nearing 26,000 last week.
IT sector drags Nifty; focus on Manappuram, Religare, EaseMyTrip, Fortis, GMR Airport.
news.summary:
Nifty fights to maintain 25,000 after shedding 200 points, nearing 26,000 last week.
IT sector drags Nifty; focus on Manappuram, Religare, EaseMyTrip, Fortis, GMR Airport.

news.title:
EaseMyTrip's Q3 net profit rose to Rs 5.8 crore from a Rs 33 crore loss QoQ, with revenue up 29% to Rs 152 crore.
YoY, net profit fell 83%, revenue increased 1%, and EBITDA declined 90% to Rs 4.8 crore.
news.summary:
EaseMyTrip's Q3 net profit rose to Rs 5.8 crore from a Rs 33 crore loss QoQ, with revenue up 29% to Rs 152 crore.
YoY, net profit fell 83%, revenue increased 1%, and EBITDA declined 90% to Rs 4.8 crore.

news.title:
Easy Trip Planners' Q3 FY26 GBR hit INR 2,213.2 Cr; EBITDA grew 15.2% QoQ to INR 13.9 Cr.
Dubai GBR surged 133% YoY to INR 397.6 Cr; hotel bookings rose 84% YoY to 4.6 lakh.
news.summary:
Easy Trip Planners' Q3 FY26 GBR hit INR 2,213.2 Cr; EBITDA grew 15.2% QoQ to INR 13.9 Cr.
Dubai GBR surged 133% YoY to INR 397.6 Cr; hotel bookings rose 84% YoY to 4.6 lakh.

news.title:
Easy Trip Planners reported Q3 FY26 revenue at ₹1,516.6M and 9M FY26 at ₹3,837.9M.
The company recorded a 9M FY26 loss before tax of ₹455.6M, approves equity fundraising.
news.summary:
Easy Trip Planners reported Q3 FY26 revenue at ₹1,516.6M and 9M FY26 at ₹3,837.9M.
The company recorded a 9M FY26 loss before tax of ₹455.6M, approves equity fundraising.

news.title:
Easy Trip Planners hit a 52-week low of Rs.6.83 on 20 Jan 2026.
The decline is attributed to persistent underperformance and weak financial results.
news.summary:
Easy Trip Planners hit a 52-week low of Rs.6.83 on 20 Jan 2026.
The decline is attributed to persistent underperformance and weak financial results.

news.title:
Easy Trip Planners appoints Ajay Kumar Chauhan as Independent Director for 5 years.
Company raises authorized share capital to ₹750 Cr and plans a new upskilling-focused subsidiary.
news.summary:
Easy Trip Planners appoints Ajay Kumar Chauhan as Independent Director for 5 years.
Company raises authorized share capital to ₹750 Cr and plans a new upskilling-focused subsidiary.

news.title:
Easy Trip Planners' board meeting on Jan 19, 2026, to discuss increasing authorized share capital.
The meeting will be conducted via video conferencing, and details are available on the company's website.
news.summary:
Easy Trip Planners' board meeting on Jan 19, 2026, to discuss increasing authorized share capital.
The meeting will be conducted via video conferencing, and details are available on the company's website.

news.title:
EaseMyTrip reported a Q2 FY26 net loss of INR 36 Cr, reversing from a profit of INR 26.8 Cr YoY.
Revenue fell 18% YoY to INR 118.3 Cr; exceptional loss of INR 51 Cr impacted bottom line due to GSA agreement.
news.summary:
EaseMyTrip reported a Q2 FY26 net loss of INR 36 Cr, reversing from a profit of INR 26.8 Cr YoY.
Revenue fell 18% YoY to INR 118.3 Cr; exceptional loss of INR 51 Cr impacted bottom line due to GSA agreement.

news.title:
Easy Trip's Q2 FY26 EBITDA rose 76.3% QoQ to INR 12.1 Cr, margin 9.6%.
GBR at INR 1958.7 Cr; Dubai ops doubled; hotel bookings up 93.3% YoY.
news.summary:
Easy Trip's Q2 FY26 EBITDA rose 76.3% QoQ to INR 12.1 Cr, margin 9.6%.
GBR at INR 1958.7 Cr; Dubai ops doubled; hotel bookings up 93.3% YoY.

news.title:
Easy Trip Planners' board approved Q2, H1 financials ending Sep 30, 2025, with unaudited results reviewed by Audit Committee.
Exceptional provision of ₹509.6 mn made; new share issue approved for Nov 4, 2025, pending necessary approvals.
news.summary:
Easy Trip Planners' board approved Q2, H1 financials ending Sep 30, 2025, with unaudited results reviewed by Audit Committee.
Exceptional provision of ₹509.6 mn made; new share issue approved for Nov 4, 2025, pending necessary approvals.

news.title:
Easy Trip Planners reports net sales drop to Rs 113.8 crore.
Profit before tax falls to Rs 4.5 crore, indicating operational challenges.
news.summary:
Easy Trip Planners reports net sales drop to Rs 113.8 crore.
Profit before tax falls to Rs 4.5 crore, indicating operational challenges.

news.title:
EaseMyTrip's board approves ₹514 crore preferential issue for capital raise.
The issue aims to support the company's growth and expansion plans.
news.summary:
EaseMyTrip's board approves ₹514 crore preferential issue for capital raise.
The issue aims to support the company's growth and expansion plans.

news.title:
EaseMyTrip signs agreements to acquire stakes in 5 firms, diversifying into real estate, hospitality, beauty, and F&B sectors.
The acquisitions include AB Finance, Three Falcons, Javaphile, Levo Beauty, and Nirvana Grand Golf Developers for Rs 194.4 Cr and Rs 175 Cr.
news.summary:
EaseMyTrip signs agreements to acquire stakes in 5 firms, diversifying into real estate, hospitality, beauty, and F&B sectors.
The acquisitions include AB Finance, Three Falcons, Javaphile, Levo Beauty, and Nirvana Grand Golf Developers for Rs 194.4 Cr and Rs 175 Cr.

news.title:
Easy Trip Planners Ltd will acquire 100% of AB Finance via equity swap.
The acquisition aims to expand business with premium commercial property.
news.summary:
Easy Trip Planners Ltd will acquire 100% of AB Finance via equity swap.
The acquisition aims to expand business with premium commercial property.
